---
title: "Programming Practice: Lab 14"
execute:
  enabled: true
  echo: true
  cache: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: false
jupyter: python3
diagram:
  cache: true
  cache-dir: ./cache
  engine:
    tikz:
      execpath: lualatex
filters:
  - diagram
---

# Quarto

Please complete the following:
- Get Started tutorial (<https://quarto.org/docs/get-started/>)
- Website creation tutorial (<https://quarto.org/docs/websites/>)
- Presentation tutorial (<https://quarto.org/docs/presentations/revealjs/>)

# Exercises

1. Create a Quarto website with the following content:
   - About page
   - RevealJS presentation
   - Documentation page for one of the previous course labs, including Mermaid diagrams and some code
